title: DfE Update: 23 July 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Information Publication of the financial handbook for independent training providers 2025   Information Update of the college financial handbook 2025   Information Updated guidance for the statutory further education sector on streamlined energy and carbon reporting   Information Change to payment date for adult skills fund (contract for services): effective August 2025   Information 16 to 19 Bursary Fund guide updated   Reminder 16 to 19 funding allocation and outturn statement R10 2024 to 2025     Latest information for academies     Article Title     Information Updated guidance for academy trusts on streamlined energy and carbon reporting   Information 16 to 19 Bursary Fund guide updated   Information Important update on PE and Sport Premium digital expenditure reporting return     Latest information for local authorities     Article Title     Information Early years funding: key changes to the local funding rules for 2026 to 2027   Information 16 to 19 Bursary Fund guide updated   Information Important update on PE and Sport Premium digital expenditure reporting return   Reminder 16 to 19 funding allocation and outturn statement R10 2024 to 2025    "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
School and academy financial management and assurance
